'''chagosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrogenesis|fibrogenesis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-g-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrogenesis|fibrogenesis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chagosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || chægesheth || chægeshej || chægeshesh || chægeshe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || chagogoshoth || chagogoshoj || chagogoshosh || chagogosho
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || chagoshoth || chagoshoj || chagoshosh || chagosho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || chagofshofth || chagofshofj || chagofshofsh || chagofshof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || chagoshotho || chagoshojo || chagoshosho || chagoshoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || chagoshoth || chagoshoj || chagoshosh || chagosho
|-
| [[Possessive]] || chagoshothol || chagoshojol || chagoshoshol || chagoshokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || chagoshoothotho || chagoshoojojo || chagoshooshosho || chagoshooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || chagoshothon || chagoshojon || chagoshoshon || chagoshokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || chagoshothooro || chagoshojooro || chagoshoshooro || chagoshokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
